Name: Yandex Music Integration
Description: Control the Yandex Music desktop app right from your Stream Deck: playback, likes, live track info with cover art, progress bar and volume. The plugin launches and controls the official Yandex Music desktop app on your computer; sign-in happens in the app itself, so the plugin never asks for your password. Requires the Yandex Music desktop app and a Yandex Plus subscription. Unofficial community plugin, not affiliated with Yandex. The settings panel is available in English and Russian. Support: https://github.com/Judd1zzz/yandex-music-streamdeck/issues
